scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.vercel:build: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('artifacts/api-server/dist/index.mjs','api-server-bundle.mjs')" && pnpm --filter @workspace/cinema-translator run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
